creator: alex@big.endian.de
text:
Thus spake Alexander Langer (alex@cichlids.com):

> Add DRIVER_MODULE(9), I think that is useful, since we have 
> DRIVER_(PROBE,ATTACH,DETACH)(9), too.
  ^^^^^^
"DEVICE" that is, and so it breaks my arguments :-), but it is nice
anyways .-)

Alex
